Name: Flux Engineer
Summary: Ethereal support mob that punishes movement and leaves behind a must-kill object.
Description:
[Spread] Pre-spread for Suppression Field and, if targeted, move as little as possible.
[Priority Target] Destroy the Mana Battery it drops on death before another mob reactivates it.
[Routing] These mobs are awkward in chain pulls because the battery can extend danger after the mob dies.

Name: Circuit Seer
Summary: Immune caster that combines rot damage, swirlies, and battery reactivations.
Description:
[Healer] Arcing Mana is the dangerous channel, so be ready with personals or healing cooldowns.
[Dodge] Move out of Erratic Zap and Power Flux, then leave the puddles behind.
[Priority] Kill nearby Mana Batteries immediately so Circuit Sense cannot reactivate them.

Name: Duskfright Herald
Summary: Void miniboss-style mob with a healing absorb channel and persistent party rot.
Description:
[Healer] Entropic Leech must be removed with an absorb clear or combat drop.
[Dodge] Dark Beckoning adds pulsing damage plus projectiles, so keep moving without dragging the pull wide.
[Priority] This is one of the most dangerous void-wing kill targets.

Name: Grand Nullifier
Summary: Interrupt check that also seeds extra awakeners on death.
Description:
[Kick] Stop every Nullify cast.
[Dodge] Avoid fear zones from Dusk Frights while holding the pull compact.
[Cleanup] After death, immediately control and kill the Smudge before it awakens a Dreadflail.

Name: Dreadflail
Summary: Immune frontal brute that becomes deadly if it gets room to spin or fixate.
Description:
[Tank] Face Void Lash away from the party and use a defensive for the empowered hits.
[Dodge] Step out of Flailstorm, or kite if you are the fixated target.
[Pull Control] Avoid waking extra Dreadflails unless stops are ready.

Name: Lightwrought
Summary: Light-wing caster with an important interrupt and a double-player dispel burden.
Description:
[Kick] Keep Holy Bolt interrupted.
[Dispel] Burning Radiance hits two players, so dispel one immediately and stabilize the other with healing or personals.
[Priority] This mob is a strong first kill in light-wing packs.
